- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Assumption used: React project scaffolded with Vite and TypeScript in the current folder.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created a Vite-style React and TypeScript project structure in the current folder.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Kept the starter app intentionally minimal and ready for feature work.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions were required by the project setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Installed Node.js locally with nvm, installed dependencies, and verified the Vite production build succeeds.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Created a VS Code task for `npm run dev` and updated it to source nvm so it works in fresh task shells.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Started the Vite dev server after confirmation. The app is available at http://localhost:5173/.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md and this file now reflect the current project state.
